description: Introducing a baby christening set, suitable for baby boys and girls aged 0-6 months, or 6-12 months. Includes a bib and pair of socks. Bib features a 'My Christening Day' or 'My Special Day' applique and socks feature an embroidered cross. Bib is made from a 100% polyester satin material, and the socks are 75% Cotton, 20% Polyester, 5% Elastane. This set is a perfect gift for a baby's Christening day. Available in White, White/Blue, or Cream.
